rule CDB_Browser_Security_ZeroDays_Are_Only_Part_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Browser Security: Zero-Days Are Only Part of the Problem"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-07-02"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: [fulldis] CVE-2026-58451 - Horde Groupware IMP path traversa"; content:"CVE-2026-58451"; nocase; sid:3770141; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2022-50973 - Yonyou KSOA 9.0 Unauthenticated File Upload"; content:"CVE-2022-50973"; nocase; sid:3782356; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
